title: Santos, SP — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Santos, SP: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Santos is a city in SP with a population of 433,656. Latin America’s largest port city, famous for its 7 km-long beachfront garden, historic coffee exchange, and Pelé’s hometown.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
